export class TaxiOpenListParser{constructor(){this._destinations=[];}flush(){this._destinations=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;const total=wrapper.readInt();this._destinations=[];for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const roomId=wrapper.readInt();const virtualRoomId=wrapper.readInt();const virtualName=wrapper.readString();// <-- read the vRoom name
this._destinations.push({roomId,virtualRoomId,virtualName});}return true;}get destinations(){return this._destinations;}}
